race.comment: TERRITORIAN (8) is going better than his form reads and has been warming nicely late over shorter trips. The rise to 1400m looks perfect fourth-up and should be running on nicely for Holder again. STAR CASINO (6) has been tiring late over longer journeys. Steps back in trip now and is drawn to bounce straight in front again. Will give another bold sight. SIR PANAMA (5) dug deep to get the verdict two back then stuck on gamely into the frame last time at Balaklava. Drops back to a winning trip and can give this a big shake. LAST WAR (18) has bounced back sharply to form in his last two. Drawn tricky but deserves his chance after two strong efforts. Watch for him launching late.
